## Description

The Shattered Reach is not one place but a thousand: a scatter of drowned peaks, reef-mazes, and floating debris-isles that were once a single coastline. Currents here run backward from the charts, and no two tide-tables agree. It is the largest surviving fragment of the world that {{the-sundering}} unmade.

## Recent History

Since the waters settled, the Reach has become the hunting ground of every ambitious captain in the free seas — {{house-veldrane}} chief among them. Its unclaimed anchorages breed towns like {{kells-hollow}} faster than any power can hold them.

## Relationships

- Contains {{kells-hollow}} and countless smaller anchorages.
- Contested by {{house-veldrane}} and the free captains.
- Its full extent is charted on {{shattered-reach-map}}.
